declared.title: State of Internet Freedom in Africa 2024: Technology and Elections
declared.selection_rationale: CIPESA's 11th annual State of Internet Freedom in Africa report, examining technology's role (both enabling and repressive) in Africa's 2024 elections. Covers all five target countries within its country findings. Coverage-contribution value: same 2024 period as this corpus's Access Now 2024 entry and OONI/Freedom House 2023-2024-period entries, from CIPESA's own research methodology — a genuine cross-organizational account of an overlapping period. Publication date approximate (month inferred from the report's October 2024 public release/FIFAfrica coverage; exact day not independently confirmed from the PDF's own title page).
